zh.Prudhoe Castle, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德普盧多
zh.Castle Prudhoe, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德普盧多
zh.Morwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德莫維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibella De Umfreville於1202年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫維其可時，她的父親Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale39歲，母親Margaret de Balliol35歲。她於1223年與Hugh de Morewick在英國諾圖波藍德莫維其可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多享年40歲。

zh-hans.Morwick, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德莫維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibella De Umfreville于1202年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫維其可时，她的父亲Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale39岁，母亲Margaret de Balliol35岁。她于1223年与Hugh de Morewick在英国諾圖波藍德莫維其可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年在英国諾圖波藍德普盧多享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Sibella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibella De Umfreville was born in 1202, in Morwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, was 39 and her mother, Margaret de Balliol, was 35. She married Hugh de Morewick in 1223, in Morwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1242, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibella De Umfreville est née en 1202, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Balliol, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Morewick en 1223, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1242, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibella De Umfreville 1202 in Morwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Balliol 35. Sie hat 1223 in Morwick, Northumberland, England Hugh de Morewick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1242 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibella De Umfreville è nata il nel 1202 nel Morwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Balliol, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Morewick nel 1223, nel Morwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1242, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Morwick, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィック
ja.lifeSummary: Sibella De Umfrevilleが1202年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックで生まれた時，父Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdaleは39歳，母Margaret de Balliolは35歳であった。1223年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックでHugh de Morewickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibella De Umfreville(이)가 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Balliol(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1223년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 Hugh de Morewick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 노르스벌랜드 플루드호에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibella De Umfreville nasceu em 1202, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Balliol, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Morewick em 1223, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1242, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibella De Umfreville родилась в 1202 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Balliol, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Morewick в 1223 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1242 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibella De Umfreville nació en 1202, en Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret de Balliol, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Hugh de Morewick en 1223, en Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1242, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
